OoOGal

OoOGal

Class for Galaxy objecy

class OoOGal.Galaxy(name=None, right_ascension=None, declination=None, redshift=None)

Galaxy class.

Represents a galaxy object with its core observational properties.

Parameters:

  • name (str, optional) – Name of the galaxy

  • right_ascension (float, optional) – Right ascension coordinate of the galaxy

  • declination (float, optional) – Declination coordinate of the galaxy

  • redshift (float, optional) – Redshift value of the galaxy

get_coords()

Get Coordinates

Reads in arbitrarily formatted object coordinates and constructs an Astropy SkyCoord object for use in astronomical queries. :param None:

Returns:

Astropy SkyCoord object representing the galaxy’s sky position

Return type:

SkyCoord

make_filter_plot()

Make Filter Plot

Generates a plot displaying the throughput and available filters for the galaxy, based on its assigned observations table. :param None:

Returns:

Figure showing filter throughput curves for all available filters

Return type:

plot

set_observations(obs_table)

Set Observations

Assigns an observations table to the galaxy instance. :param obs_table: Astropy Table containing observational data for the galaxy :type obs_table: Table

Returns:

None
